rationale: Improvement to BSON exception message specificity; internal error messaging, no spec rule violated.
Internal refactor of exception class selection switch statements; no spec behavior involved.
Updating test expectations for exception type on server selection timeout; test tooling fix, not spec conformance.
Internal correctness fix ensuring ExecutionTimeoutException only triggers on server error domain, not spec violation.
Use-after-free/segfault when Session freed before Cursor; memory safety bug, no specific spec rule violated.
PHP-specific wildcard typemap extension; new feature for PHP type mapping, not a cross-driver spec area.
PHP-internal reference counting bug during cursor var_dump; memory management bug, no spec involvement.
Sessions spec requires getMore to use same session as originating aggregate command; driver reuses wrong session from LIFO pool.
Directly quotes Sessions spec: implicit session MUST be returned to pool immediately after cursor exhausted; driver delayed release.
Sessions spec: drivers MUST NOT send session ID with unacknowledged writes; driver was creating implicit sessions for such commands.
Internal PHP extension fix to break subscriber loop on exception; no spec behavior involved.
Fix for Mongo Orchestration test API URL construction; CI/test tooling bug, not spec tests.
Build configuration: prefixing configure options with 'mongodb' to avoid conflicts; packaging change.
PHP 7.3 compatibility update for internal recursion protection; extension internals, no spec behavior.
References spec change commit; implements spec requirement to decrease implicit session leaks (MUST return sessions promptly).
TLS renegotiation segfault on macOS Secure Transport; network/TLS layer bug dependent on CDRIVER fix, no spec rule.
Sporadic SCRAM-SHA-1 auth failures possibly linked to libmongoc caching change; no specific spec rule identified as violated.
Depends on SPEC-1040 and DRIVERS-465; spec update to Kerberos hostname canonicalization algorithm requires driver implementation update.
Segfault during OpenSSL cleanup due to callback ordering between PHP extensions; memory safety bug, no spec involvement.
arrayFilters appended as BSON document instead of array; spec requires array type for arrayFilters option in bulk update.
User-reported build failure due to missing sasl.h header; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Adding PHP var_export() and serialization support for driver objects; PHP-specific API feature, not a cross-driver spec area.
wtimeoutMS should always be validated in URI options; aligning with spec behavior after CDRIVER-2621 and DRIVERS-2074 guidance.
Tracking ticket to add test ensuring client-side error for arrayFilters on pre-3.6 server; test addition, not a spec rule violation in itself.
DRIVERS-492 coordination: spec requires FNV-1a instead of MD5 for ObjectID generation for FIPS compliance.
Build configuration bug: 'yes' not accepted as value for --with-mongodb-sasl configure option; packaging issue.
Error labels must be populated on BulkWriteException per spec; implementing error label exposure for retryable writes/transactions.
Use-after-free crash when calling session methods after endSession(); memory safety bug in PHP object lifecycle, not spec violation.
Test failure in session-advanceOperationTime test on macOS; appears to be platform-specific test runner issue, not driver spec bug.
Empty driversOptions array overrides SSL URI options; internal option merging bug in PHP extension, no spec rule violated.
Valgrind-detected memory corruption in BSON field path tracking for deeply nested documents; memory safety bug, no spec rule.
Build/packaging issue: OpenSSL 1.1 not detected when pkg-config unavailable; no spec behavior involved.
Internal bug: phongo_execute_query() mutates Query opts struct, causing duplicate fields if Query reused; implementation bug.
Adding PHP __set_state() serialization support for driver objects; PHP-specific API feature, not cross-driver spec.
Typo fix in ReadPreference::__set_state() error messages that incorrectly say WriteConcern; documentation/message fix.
Windows-specific 64-to-32-bit integer downcast in PHP array API affecting test assertions; platform bug in internals.
Removing XFAIL from retryable-writes-004.phpt after CDRIVER-2432 fix; spec test maintenance update.
PHP-specific API design: Exception interface extending Throwable for static analysis; no cross-driver spec behavior.
Internal code quality: changing got_iterator field type from int to bool; no behavior change, no spec involvement.
WriteResult inaccessible on socket error during bulk write; API ergonomics improvement, no clear spec rule mandating this behavior.
Error labels on cursor exceptions needed for transactions spec; using wrong error API meant error labels were not exposed per spec.
Client metadata handshake truncated by CFLAGS/LDFLAGS; implementation quality issue, no spec rule on field ordering violated.
DRIVERS-624: spec requires 4.0 drivers to error when attempting sharded transactions on 4.2 server; missing required error.
Memory leak fix: server description not freed before return in sharded cluster check; implementation bug found in code review.
Depends on SPEC-1292 and DRIVERS-664: spec updated to prohibit sending $readPreference to standalone servers; driver not yet compliant.
DRIVERS-699: spec requires actionable error message when retryWrites fails due to unsupported storage engine; driver lacked this.
Speculative tracking ticket: may reject empty username depending on CDRIVER-3012 outcome; no concrete spec rule cited.
Documentation bug: Session::startTransaction() docs incorrectly state parameter type and required status; docs fix only.
PHP parameter parsing consistency fix: using '|a!' instead of '|a' to accept null; internal API consistency, not spec violation.
Arginfo metadata fix: Session::startTransaction() incorrectly reports required parameter; internal reflection data fix.
